{{Quote|About as far out on the Rim as you can get without falling off the map. If you're looking to drop off the galactic radar, this giant ball of sand would seem the perfect place to disappear.|[[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]]|<ref name="Empire 23">[[Empire 23|''Empire'' 23]]</ref>}}
'''Stoga''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A [[Temperature/Legends|dry]], [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world of large canyons and craggy rock formations, Stoga was largely overlooked by the galactic governments due to its remote location—making it a haven for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], outlaws and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to keep a low profile.

==History==
[[File:Stoga_canyon.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A canyon on Stoga.]]

It was also home to six [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebel cells]] loyal to [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], under the leadership of [[Karn]] and [[Lhira]]. However, these cells were compromised after [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] sought refuge on Stoga. He befriended [[Rasha Bex]], believing her to be an ally to his cause, though in fact she was a spy for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Imperial forces were called in, with orders to wipe out Bel Iblis' cells on the planet. BoShek himself was transported off Stoga as a prisoner of the Empire.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 23|''Empire'' 23]] {{1st}}
